mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movie_sync_log (sync_type, total_count, success_count, fail_count, started_at, status) VALUES (#{syncType}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{failCount}, #{startedAt}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE movie_sync_log SET total_count = #{totalCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, sync_type, total_count, success_count, fail_count, started_at, completed_at, status, error_message FROM movie_sync_log ORDER BY started_at DESC
